title: 284a's healthBar
description: turns normal health indicator and hunger indicator into a bar.
body:
![survival normal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b43761be3025836f1f6a89fc7b4d2e6cda6fdcdf.png)

this is my first resource pack. it turns normal health indicaitor and hunger inticaitor into a **_bar_** in both survival and hardcore.

**NOTE: in order to use this resource pack with other resource packs that change the texture of the health indicator or the hunger indicator, you need to put the other resource pack in a higher order to make it work.**

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5360bfb5e7a3c01479010166642dd7216d631803.png)
